turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi bruce , how is Bruce ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hey , good to see the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good to see Bruce as well . uh , so the doctor knows the nurse told Bruce a little bit about dax .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor'd like to tell dax about Bruce-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay ? so bruce is a 60 year old male , with a past medical history , significant for depression , type two diabetes and hypertension , who presents for followup of Bruce's chronic problems . so , bruce , the doctor saw Bruce a couple months ago-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how is Bruce- how is Bruce doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: it's been a crazy year and a half and Bruce thinks the uh the anxiety , the pressure of getting ready for thanksgiving was really starting to wear on Bruce .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . did Bruce have a nice holiday ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Bruce , Bruce did but the holiday was uh , the holiday was great to see everybody after about two years but the holiday was just a lot of work . a lot of stress .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah . yeah . and what does Bruce have to look forward for like , the new year and that type of thing . is Bruce- more gatherings like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um Bruce is planning to take a vacation . so hopefully somewhere nice and warm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , well how is Bruce doing in terms of Bruce's depression . the doctor knows that the doctor and Bruce have kind of talked about depression in the past .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and the doctor and Bruce have n't put Bruce on medication because Bruce is on other meds and Bruce- Bruce have n't really wanted to do starting depression medication , so what strategies is Bruce using ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . over the summer Bruce and other people tried something new . Bruce started going for long walks outside every morning. the weather was so nice and all the plants were in full bloom that Bruce loved to start Bruce's day that way. on the weekends, the long walks even encouraged Bruce to do a little in the yard himself which was a nice way to be active and get some sun. but with the seasons changing and the weather getting so cold out, Bruce has not been able to keep doing the long walks and Bruce needs to find something new to do. . Bruce is not ready yet to try any meds , so Bruce thinks Bruce'd like to look into some alternative options .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so yeah . so the doctor and Bruce can talk about some therapy and-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that type of thing .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . and no ... Bruce do n't wan na harm Bruce or others ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: any thoughts like thoughts of harming Bruce or others .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no , okay . and then in terms of Bruce's diabetes , how is Bruce doing , you know especially with the holidays managing Bruce's sugar intake and that type of thing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , Bruce got through halloween okay . Bruce did n't stick to the diet too much through the thanksgiving week but Bruce's diet is a little bit better . so Bruce's been trying to really monitor Bruce's sugar intake .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and is Bruce ... Bruce's still taking the metformin , correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and then in terms of Bruce's high blood pressure , did Bruce buy the blood pressure cuff that the doctor recommended ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and how have the blood pressure readings been running . the doctor have n't received any you know notes from Bruce in the portal .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nothing out of the ordinary . Bruce's blood pressure readings have been pretty moderate .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: Bruce's blood pressure readings have been pretty good . and Bruce's still taking the lisinopril , no problems with lisinopril ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm . correct .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . the doctor know Bruce did a review of system sheet when Bruce checked in .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , does Bruce have any symptoms . chest pain , shortness of breath , belly pain-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: blood in Bruce's stool .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: weight loss . anything like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . the doctor wan na go ahead and do a quick physical exam .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon . show the doctor the vital signs . so here in the office . the doctor agree . Bruce's blood pressure looks good . uh , the doctor think Bruce's doing a good job with Bruce's blood pressure so keep up the good work . the doctor'm gon na go ahead and take a listen to Bruce's heart and lungs , the doctor'll let Bruce know what the doctor find .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . so on physical examination , everything looks pretty good , so on Bruce's neck exam , the doctor do n't appreciate any carotid bruits . on Bruce's heart exam the doctor do appreciate a slight two out of six systolic ejection murmur heard at the left base , which the doctor and Bruce've heard in the past .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: Bruce's lungs are nice and clear and Bruce do have uh one plus non-pitting edema bilaterally in Bruce's lower extremities . so what does all that mean ? all that just means the doctor heard a little sound in Bruce's heart , which Bruce know is n't anything clinically significant . the doctor and Bruce had looked into the heart murmur last year .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: Bruce do have a little swelling in Bruce's legs but the leg swelling might just be from Bruce's diet recently , okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor wan na just take a look at some of Bruce's results . hey dragon , show the doctor the ekg . so the doctor just had the nurse do an ekg on Bruce before Bruce came in just to make sure the doctor were n't missing anything . Bruce's in Bruce's 60's the doctor have some risk factors . everything looks good .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: there's no evidence on the EKG that the doctor'm concerned about anything at this time . hey dragon , show the doctor the diabetes logs . so on Bruce's diabetic labs , Bruce's hemoglobin a1c is elevated . Bruce's hemoglobin a1c is at eight . the doctor'd like to see Bruce's hemoglobin a1c closer to six . now some of the elevated hemoglobin a1c might be having to do with the holidays that type of thing but the doctor still think that the doctor need to get Bruce's hemoglobin a1c under better control .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so lets talk a little bit about the doctor's assessment and plan for Bruce so for Bruce's first problem of Bruce's depression the doctor'd like to just go ahead and refer Bruce to uh psychiatry not for medications , but just for some talk therapy that type of thing , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that's fine .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , for Bruce's second problem of Bruce's type two diabetes the doctor'd like to go ahead and order a hemoglobin a1c in the next couple months . the doctor want to increase the metformin to 1000 milligrams twice a day . and the doctor and Bruce're gon na go ahead and order a lipid panel , okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , lastly for Bruce's third problem for Bruce's hypertension the doctor'm gon na go ahead and order an echocardiogram just to recheck the echocardiogram . just the heart murmur . and the doctor'm going to go ahead and keep the lisinopril at 20 milligrams a day . does Bruce have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no questions .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay the nurse will be in soon , the nurse'll get Bruce checked out , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the doctor got it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , finalize the note .
